modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help finding faculty portal usernames for Digital Measures.

full_description_text:
- I am trying to access the faculty portal usernames.  
- This is important for me to make users in Digital Measures.  
- I would appreciate any guidance on how to locate this information.  
- Thank you for your help!
